risks: Application Gateway uses Standard_v2 SKU but includes WAF configuration — WAF requires WAF_v2 SKU and will fail deployment
SQL Server has publicNetworkAccess set to 'Enabled' — Azure security best practices recommend private endpoints for production databases to prevent data exfiltration
Container Registry has publicNetworkAccess set to 'Enabled' — consider restricting via private endpoint for production workloads
No Log Analytics workspace resource defined — AKS omsagent addon is enabled but has no workspace target for telemetry
Service mesh (Istio) is referenced in overallReasoning but not configured in AKS serviceMeshProfile properties — the user explicitly requested service mesh for traffic control
No Public IP resource defined for Application Gateway — Standard_v2/WAF_v2 requires a Standard SKU Public IP for internet-facing ingress
Catalog database uses serverless SKU (GP_S_Gen5_2) with 60-second auto-pause — may introduce cold-start latency for user-facing catalog queries in an e-commerce workload
correctionsRecommended: Change Application Gateway SKU from 'Standard_v2' to 'WAF_v2' and tier to 'WAF_v2' to support the included webApplicationFirewall configuration
Add a Log Analytics workspace resource (Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces) and reference its ID in the AKS omsagent addon logAnalyticsWorkspaceResourceID property
Add Istio service mesh addon configuration to AKS properties (serviceMeshProfile with mode 'Istio') to fulfill the user's service mesh requirement
Add a Public IP resource (Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses, Standard SKU, Static allocation) and reference it in the Application Gateway frontendIPConfiguration
Set SQL Server publicNetworkAccess to 'Disabled' and add a private endpoint resource for VNet-based connectivity from AKS
Consider setting ACR publicNetworkAccess to 'Disabled' and configuring a private endpoint, with AKS using managed identity acrPull role assignment for image access
Add an explicit dependency from AKS to ACR for managed identity-based image pull (acrPull role assignment resource)
hardDependencies: Application Gateway SKU 'Standard_v2' conflicts with included webApplicationFirewall properties — Standard_v2 does not support WAF; deployment will fail unless SKU is changed to 'WAF_v2'
